calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURS., DEC-06-2012: DEFENDANT ALEX FISHMAN APPEARS THIS DAY IN PROPRIA PERSONA ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT DELECTABLE, INC., ET AL; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR THE PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY DEFENDANT WHO DISCUSSES THE CAUSE.

THEREUPON, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PRO TEM JUDGE ELLIOT MYLES; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Continued To Sep-18-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506
